subject: Upcoming Auction - REIT Sale | 1529 West Lancaster Street - Bluffton, IN
text: Email from Jim Palmer Starting Bid: $100,000 ASSET SNAPSHOT Property Type: Healthcare Number of Rooms: 46 Rooms Property Size: 36,194 SF Land Area: 3.77 AC Year Built: 1962/2026 VIEW AUCTION PAGE INVESTMENT HIGHLIGHTS Vacant 36,194 SF Healthcare Opportunity: 46-room, 90-bed facility available for immediate repositioning or re-tenanting. Significant Below Replacement Cost Basis: 36,194 SF of institutional-grade infrastructure at a fraction of ground-up cost. Broad Adaptive Reuse Flexibility: Supports senior housing, behavioral health, memory care, workforce, or multifamily conversion. Purpose-Built Residential Infrastructure: Existing rooms, dining, and common areas reduce development cost and timeline. Strong Senior Demographic Demand: 25%+ of the 5-mile population is aged 55+, with growth projected through 2030.
